mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXCHANGE_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TRADE_TYPE, FX_SURYO_METHOD, FX_SELLING_METHOD, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_NAME, FX_ORDER_AMOUNT, FX_TRADING, APPLY_SPREAD, FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE, FX_DEPOSIT_TYPE, FX_TRADE_SERVICE_TYPE, FX_ORDER_STATUS, FX_CYCLE_NO, FX_EVENT_ID, ORDER_NO, EXEC_DATETIME, STL_DATE, EXCHANGE_RATE, EXCHANGE_RATE_DATETIME, STL_AMOUNT_YEN, ORDER_DATETIME, ORDER_SHUBETSU, API_ERROR_CODE, API_STATUS_CODE, API_MESSAGE, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.tradeCd}, null, null, #{req.currencyCode}, #{req.currency}, #{req.fxOrderAmount}, #{req.fxTrade}, null, #{req.accountClassFxTrade}, null, #{req.fxTradeServiceClass}, #{req.fxTradeOrderStatus}, #{req.fxTradeCycleNumber}, #{req.fxTradeOrderEventId}, #{req.orderNumber}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.brokerChargeCode}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.creator}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_EXCHANGE_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
